steps.title: Use quadratic table regression for the coefficient
steps.content: The product is equivalent to $ax^2+bx+c$, so evaluate the product at three easy $x$-values and regress those outputs to a quadratic. Desmos then gives the middle coefficient directly.

steps.title: Read b and confirm the arithmetic
steps.content:
The regression returns $b=-419$. By hand, the $x$-terms from FOIL are $3x\cdot6=18x$ and $-23\cdot19x=-437x$, so
$$18x-437x=-419x$$
Therefore the value of $b$ is -419.
